payload.answer: Committed supported memories: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; there is an open loop for Daniele to send Sam an unspecified article in the context of AI infra.
citations: Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra.
Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity IDs were provided; entities should not be merged or resolved beyond the names explicitly present.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has lately been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam asked Daniele to send him an article related to AI infra, but the specific article is not identified.

details: Recorded employment update with Goldman as former employer and Point72 as current employer.
Recorded music preference without treating early Coltrane as replacing Bill Evans.
Recorded open loop for an unspecified article; did not infer article title or content.
